reason: This is a common Islamic religious phrase from the Quran (9:129) meaning 'Allah is sufficient for me. There is no deity except Him. On Him I have relied, and He is the Lord of the Great Throne.' Simply quoting religious text does not indicate ISIS support.
original_post: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لا إِلَـهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ - via - 616
